desc: Command: Creates a floor plan view on a target level with optional scope box and template.
summary: Command: Creates a floor plan view on a target level with optional scope box and template. Delegates to CreateFloorplan.GetAll for the actual view creation. Executable via execute_command (orchestrator) — not an MCP read-only tool. Called by SheetSetUpCommand during automated sheet setup. Related: CreateReflectedCeilingPlanCommand for ceiling plans.
usecase: User wants to create a floor plan view for a level. User is setting up views during sheet setup workflow.
notfor: Creating reflected ceiling plans (use CreateReflectedCeilingPlanCommand). Creating section views (use CreateSectionFromGridlineCommand).
precondition: Active document must be open. Target level must exist in the model.
postcondition: A new ViewPlan (FloorPlan) is created on the given level with optional scope box and template applied.

config_inputs.name: levelName
config_inputs.description: Target level name (required if levelId not provided).

config_inputs.name: scopeBoxName
config_inputs.description: Optional scope box name to apply.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Created view id, name, level, type.

preprompts: Setting up a new floor plan...
successprompts: Done! Floor plan is ready on {levelName}
